name: 凡人修仙传
title: 凡人修仙传
title_en: A Record of a Mortal s Journey to Immortality

title: المنتقمون يوم القيامة
overview: أبطال محبوبون من ثلاثة أكوان مختلفة يُدفعون نحو صدام مميت ويواجهون تهديدًا مرعبًا قد يمحو وجودهم بالكامل شيء يفوق كل ما عرفوه من قبل
overview_en: Beloved heroes from three distinct universes are set on a deadly collision course and face an existential threat unlike anything they ve ever encountered

name: Hacks
overview: ‫يشكل صوتان كوميديان موهوبان من أجيال مختلفة رابطًا غير محتمل عندما تضطر ممثلة كوميدية أسطورية من لاس فيغاس إلى توظيف كاتبة شابة طموحة

seasons.name: الموسم 1
seasons.overview: ‫تحتاج "ديبرا فانس" إلى ابتكار شيء ما لتجنب فقدان إقامتها في كازينو "بالميتو"، ليتم إرسال لها "أيفا"، وهي كاتبة كوميديا ​​شابة غير قادرة على العثور على عمل بسبب موضوع حساس وسمعتها المتمحورة حول الذات والغطرسة.

seasons.name: الموسم 2
seasons.overview: ‫يستمر الإرشاد المظلم بين الممثلة الكوميدية الأسطورية "ديبرا فانس" في "لاس فيغاس"، وكاتبة الكوميديا الشابة الصاعدة "أيفا" في التطور بينما يشرع الثنائي في رحلة برية عبر البلاد لإحياء روتين "ديبرا" الجديد.

title: Hacks
overview_en: Explore a dark mentorship that forms between Deborah Vance a legendary Las Vegas comedian and an entitled outcast 25 year old

name: 乙女怪獣キャラメリゼ
original_name: 乙女怪獣キャラメリゼ
title: 乙女怪獣キャラメリゼ
overview_en: Kuroe Akaishi just wants a normal high school life but that s impossible with a rare condition that turns her into a giant kaiju whenever her emotions spike Things get even worse when she falls for Arata Minami the most popular boy in class Now every blush heartbeat and crush could trigger a monster transformation Can Kuroe survive high school love before it destroys everything around her

title: Amarga Navidad
overview_en: After her mother dies in December advertising director Elsa immerses herself in work to cope When a panic attack forces her to take a break she decides to travel to Lanzarote with her friend Patricia The story of these women run parallel to that of a screenwriter and film director exploring how life and fiction are inseparably linked sometimes painfully so

title: 宗师叶问2
overview_en: In 1950s Hong Kong British merchants and Chinese triads have joined forces to expand their territory forcibly demolishing factories without regard for public welfare This move draws fierce opposition from Ip Man standing up for the workers he faces pressure from all sides Framed for murder he is sent to prison Within the prison walls the triads set multiple deadly traps Can Ip Man overcome these trials escape the danger and clear his name

title: Normal
overview_en: An unassuming substitute sheriff with a troubled past responds to a bank robbery in a small sleepy town and unknowingly uncovers something far more explosive

name: 天は赤い河のほとり
title: 天は赤い河のほとり
overview_en: After a mysterious hand drags her beneath a puddle modern Japanese teenager Yuri awakens in the Hittite Empire of the 14th century BCE Thrust into a deadly struggle for the throne she joins Prince Kail to battle assassins outwit royal conspiracies and survive a world at war As her exploits earn her renown as the goddess Ishtar Yuri must choose between her old life and an uncertain future

title: Alter ego
overview_en: Alex a quiet forty something leads an ordinary life until new neighbours move in The husband is Alex s perfect lookalike except for one thing he has hair Alex sinks into a growing paranoia as he becomes preoccupied with this more charismatic brilliant and accomplished mysterious double

name: El señor de los cielos
title: El señor de los cielos
overview_en: Set in the 1990s these are the life and times of Amado Carrillo Fuentes a man who became the head of the Juárez cartel Nicknamed El Señor de los Cielos Lord of the Skies because of the large fleet of airplanes he used to transport drugs he was also known for washing more than 200 million through Colombia to finance his huge fleet He is described as the most powerful drug trafficker of his time

title: Love Ngo
overview_en: Love Ngo follows Ngongo a hardworking young man who volunteers at a cleft lip and palate foundation while helping at his mother s burger stand The film explores his struggles with love family and self acceptance after falling for a woman whose family disapproves of his condition and social status

name: The Vampire Lestat
title: The Vampire Lestat
overview_en: The Vampire Lestat goes on tour while being haunted by muses from his past As the band s popularity grows so does Lestat s influence over vampires humans alike leaving others to contend with Lestat s power in the face of the Great Conversion

title: نبرة خفية
overview_en: The host of a popular paranormal podcast becomes haunted by terrifying recordings mysteriously sent her way

name: ヒロイン？聖女？いいえ、オールワークスメイドです（誇）！
original_name: ヒロイン？聖女？いいえ、オールワークスメイドです（誇）！
title: ヒロイン 聖女 いいえ オールワークスメイドです 誇
title_en: Heroine Saint No I m an All Works Maid and Proud of It
overview_en: Melody may be the heroine and saint destined to save the world from a rising demon king but all she wants to do is become a perfect maid Reincarnated in a story based video game Melody veers off the set story path refusing to heed the call to action and instead using her powers to clean Her new world becomes increasingly chaotic and the story Totally unhinged and unpredictable

name: فارس من الممالك السبع
original_name: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
overview: تدور الأحداث في زمن لا يزال فيه سلالة تارجارين تسيطر على العرش الحديدي وذكرى آخر تنين لم تغب بعد عن الذاكرة الحية تنتظر الأقدار العظيمة والأعداء الأقوياء والمغامرات الخطيرة هؤلاء الأصدقاء الذين لا مثيل لهم والذين لا يمكن توقعهم

seasons.name: الموسم 1
seasons.overview: قبل قرنٍ من أحداث "صراع العروش"، كان السير دنكان الطويل ومرافقه إيغ يتجولان في ويستروس بينما كانت سلالة تارغاريان تحكم العرش الحديدي. مصائر عظيمة وأعداءٌ ينتظرون الصديقين اللذين لا يُضاهيان.

title: فارس من الممالك السبع
overview_en: A century before the events of Game of Thrones two unlikely heroes wandered Westeros a young naive but courageous knight Ser Duncan the Tall and his diminutive squire Egg Set in an age when the Targaryen line still holds the Iron Throne and the last dragon has not yet passed from living memory great destinies powerful foes and dangerous exploits await these improbable and incomparable friends

title: Tuner
overview_en: A gifted piano tuner s meticulous skills for tuning pianos lead him to discover an unexpected aptitude for cracking safes turning his life upside down

title: Midwinter Break
overview_en: Longtime retired couple Stella and Gerry realise that their relationship has reached a crossroads while on holiday in Amsterdam After so much time and so many memories long held promises and deeply concealed wounds threaten to come to light and force them to confront their future

title: The Perfect Gamble
overview_en: Two gamblers released from prison decide to open an illegal casino but get entangled with the mafia with one gambler s girlfriend caught in the middle

name: 问心
title: 问心
overview_en: Xiao Feng is the Deputy Chief Physician of the Cardiology Department at Dongli Hospital He is introverted and strict He becomes work partners with the impulsive doctor Lin Yi yet friction arises due to the differences in their medical beliefs Meanwhile Xiao Feng s younger sister also gets a job working as a doctor at the Intensive Care Unit

title: موت روبن هود
overview: بينما يصارع ماضيه المليء بالجرائم والقتل يتعرض روبن هود لإصابة خطيرة بعد معركة ظن أنها ستكون الأخيرة في حياته وبين يدي امرأة غامضة تُمنح له فرصة جديدة للخلاص والتكفير عما ارتكبه في الماضي
overview_en: Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last In the hands of a mysterious woman he is offered a chance at salvation

name: حب متأخر خير من عزوبية دائمة
overview: يتلقى العزّاب الأبديون البالغون الذين لم يسبق لهم خوض أي علاقة عاطفية تدريبات على يد خبراء لمساعدتهم في العثور الحب في برنامج مواعدة واقعي جديد كليًا وزاخر بالحيوية
title: حب متأخر خير من عزوبية دائمة
overview_en: Ready to step into the dating world lifelong singles get expert help for style health and confidence Will they manage hiccups on their way to love

name: 対ありでした。～お嬢さまは格闘ゲームなんてしない～
original_name: 対ありでした。～お嬢さまは格闘ゲームなんてしない～
title: 対ありでした お嬢さまは格闘ゲームなんてしない
title_en: Young Ladies Don t Play Fighting Games
overview_en: Mitsuki Aya has one goal at the elite Kuromi Girls Academy to become a refined young lady like the school s flawless White Lily Yorue Mio But her image of Mio shatters when Aya accidentally catches her playing fighting games Turns out the elegant Mio is actually a hardcore gamer and she wants to duel Aya The battle and their friendship begins

name: 雀骨
title: 雀骨
overview_en: A cunning woman and a man hiding deadly power enter a fake marriage but amidst schemes and war they unexpectedly fall into a sincere passionate love

title: Whistle
overview_en: A misfit group of unwitting high school students stumble upon a cursed object an ancient Aztec Death Whistle They discover that blowing the whistle and the terrifying sound it emits will summon their future deaths to hunt them down

name: 透明な夜に駆ける君と、目に見えない恋をした。
original_name: 透明な夜に駆ける君と、目に見えない恋をした。
title: 透明な夜に駆ける君と 目に見えない恋をした
title_en: Love Unseen Beneath the Clear Night Sky
overview_en: Kakeru Sorano a quiet university freshman who avoids others meets Koharu Fuyutsuki a blind girl who faces the world with quiet brightness When she says I want to see fireworks someday something in Kakeru shifts As they grow closer through small moments and shared loneliness he searches for a way to make her wish come true

name: The Agency
title: The Agency
overview_en: Covert CIA agent Martian is ordered to abandon his undercover life and return to London Station When the love he left behind unexpectedly reappears their romance reignites pitting his career his real identity and his mission against his heart while hurling them both into a deadly game of international intrigue and espionage

name: きみが死ぬまで恋をしたい
original_name: きみが死ぬまで恋をしたい
title: きみが死ぬまで恋をしたい
title_en: I Want to Love You Till Your Dying Day
overview_en: At a secret academy where orphaned girls are raised as weapons death is routine and grief is forbidden Sheena a 14 year old who questions this brutal life meets Mimi a mysterious blood soaked girl who refuses to break In a world built on violence the two cling to fragile hope and fight to hold on to their humanity

name: المنيع
overview: عندما يرث مارك غرايسون قوى خارقة في السابعة عشر من عمره ينضم إلى والده كواحد من أعظم أبطال الأرض هذا يحقق جميع أحلامه إلى أن يغير حدث مروع كل شيء

seasons.name: الموسم 2
seasons.overview: يكافح "مارك" لبناء حياته بعد تعرّضه لخيانة مزلزلة. في مواجهة تهديدات بنهاية العالم، يكتشف حلفاءً جدداً ويتصارع مع أعظم مخاوفه، أنه قد يصير مثل أبيه.

seasons.name: الموسم 3
seasons.overview: يتغيّر كل شيء عندما يُجبر "مارك" على مواجهة ماضيه ومستقبله، بينما يكتشف كم عليه المضيّ أكثر لحماية من يحبهم.

seasons.name: الموسم 4
seasons.overview: بينما يستجمع العالم شتاته بعد كارثة الموسم السابق، يصارع "مارك" إرثاً ثقيلاً من الندم، محاولاً حماية وطنه ومن يحب. لكنه سرعان ما يصطدم بتهديد جديد وفتاك، يضعه في مواجهة حتمية قد تغيّر مصير البشرية إلى الأبد.

title: المنيع
overview_en: Mark Grayson is a normal teenager except for the fact that his father is the most powerful superhero on the planet Shortly after his seventeenth birthday Mark begins to develop powers of his own and enters into his father s tutelage

name: 죄와 사랑
title: 죄와 사랑
overview_en: Police officers drug dealers and spies a mysterious kidnapping uncovers a criminal network while love and sex become tools of exchange

name: ورشة ذوي القبعات
original_name: とんがり帽子のアトリエ
overview: في عالمٍ يُعد فيه السحر هبةً تولد مع البعض فقط تحلم كوكو الفتاة القروية البسيطة بأن تصبح ساحرة رغم علمها باستحالة ذلك لكن حياتها تنقلب رأساً على عقب عندما تكتشف بالصدفة السر الحقيقي وراء إلقاء التعاويذ وهو أن السحر يُرسم ولا يُورث بعد حادثة مأساوية تسببت بها جهلها بالقواعد يقرر الساحر كيفري اتخاذها تلميذة له تبدأ كوكو رحلتها في المرسم لتعلم فن رسم السحر في قصة تمزج بين بهجة الاكتشاف ومرارة اليأس والسعي نحو الأمل
title: ورشة ذوي القبعات
overview_en: In a world where only witches can cast magic they must avoid being seen by ordinary people while casting While Coco does her chores she daydreams of becoming a witch When a young witch named Qifrey visits her village Coco uncovers the absolute secret becomes Qifrey s apprentice and begins her studies This is the story of children who encounter despair yet reach out toward hope

title: الشجرة السحرية البعيدة
overview: تنتقل عائلة معاصرة للعيش في الريف حيث يكتشف الأطفال شجرة سحرية يسكنها مقيمون غريبو الأطوار يُنقل الأطفال إلى أراضٍ خيالية مما يعيد إحياء الروابط العائلية بينهم من خلال المغامرات
overview_en: A modern family relocates to the countryside where the children discover a magical tree with eccentric residents They re transported to fantastical lands rekindling their family bond through adventures

title: Ангелы Ладоги
overview_en: In November at the very beginning of the terrible winter of 1941 when the blockade ring closes around Leningrad a group of young iceboat athletes goes out onto the thin not yet formed ice The mission to deliver ammunition turns into an operation to save orphans from an orphanage who were not evacuated in time Former rivals in regatta sports must now turn into a real united team in order to survive themselves and give hope to everyone else

title: 호프
overview_en: In the remote South Korean village of Hope Harbor police chief Bum seok and officer Sung ae are called to investigate a mysterious creature wreaking havoc on the community But all is not as it seems and perceptions can be misleading What begins as ignorance plants the seed of disaster escalating through human conflict into a tragedy of cosmic proportions

name: 도깨비 10주년 여행
title: 도깨비 10주년 여행
title_en: Guardian The Lonely and Great God 10th Anniversary
overview_en: Ten years after Goblin Gong Yoo Lee Dong wook Kim Go eun and Yoo In na reunite for a special journey revisiting iconic locations from the drama and sharing memories stories and reflections on one of Korea s most beloved series

name: バンドリ！ ゆめ∞みた
original_name: バンドリ！ ゆめ∞みた
title: バンドリ ゆめ みた
overview_en: Suddenly thrown together a group of girls are now debuting as the virtual band Mugendai Mewtype They ve got talent and personality but no clue how to perform as one Can they survive let alone make it to the top in this unforgiving music world

title: Leviticus
overview_en: Two teenage boys must escape a violent entity that takes the form of the person they desire most each other

name: 镖人
title: 镖人
overview_en: A extraordinary guard walks in the desert of the Western regions On the way escaping the killing by the government he took a guarding task with destination to the capital Chang an The task was thought as just a simple one but actually it is a road full of crisis and danger A journey affecting the fate of the world begins

name: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness: An Almost History of America
original_name: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness: An Almost History of America
title: Life Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness An Almost History of America
title_en: Life Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness An Almost History of America
overview_en: An improvised comedic approach to major events in American history in celebration of the 250th anniversary of the founding of the United States

name: Pluribus
overview: يلزم أتعس شخص على وجه الأرض إنقاذ العالم من السعادة
title: Pluribus
overview_en: The most miserable person on Earth must save the world from happiness

name: فيوتشراما
overview: يحكي المسلسل مغامرات صبي توصيل البيتزا فيليب جي فراي في مدينة نيويورك في أواخر القرن العشرين الذي تم تجميده عن غير قصد لألف عام بعدها وجد عملاً في القرن الحادي والثلاثين المستقبلي في شركة التوصيل بين الكواكب Planet Express
title: فيوتشراما
overview_en: The adventures of a late 20th century New York City pizza delivery boy Philip J Fry who after being unwittingly cryogenically frozen for one thousand years finds employment at Planet Express an interplanetary delivery company in the retro futuristic 31st century

name: 灿如繁星
title: 灿如繁星
overview_en: When Lin Wanxing returns to her hometown and takes a job at a local high school she s unexpectedly tasked with reviving its long disbanded soccer team With help from her mysterious tenant former coach Wang Fa they work to rebuild the team guide the students toward their dreams and face the shadows of their own pasts along the way

name: غضب على الطريق
overview: يتورط مقاول فاشل ورائدة أعمال غير ناجحة في حادثة غضب على الطريق فتشتعل شرارة عدائية بين هذين الغريبين اللذين يُطلقان العنان لأحلك مكنونات نفسيهما

seasons.name: الموسم 1
seasons.overview: يتورط مقاول فاشل ورائدة أعمال غير ناجحة في حادثة غضب على الطريق، فتشتعل شرارة عدائية بين هذين الغريبين اللذين يُطلقان العنان لأحلك مكنونات نفسيهما.

title: غضب على الطريق
overview_en: A road rage incident between two strangers a failing contractor and an unfulfilled entrepreneur sparks a feud that brings out their darkest impulses

title: أرسل المساعدة
overview: تعرّفوا على ليندا ليدل كانت تعمل في قسم الاستراتيجية والتخطيط وهي الآن المديرة نظرة عامة يُحاصر زميلان على جزيرة مهجورة وهما الناجيان الوحيدان من تحطم طائرة على الجزيرة عليهما تجاوز خلافات الماضي والعمل معًا من أجل البقاء ولكن في النهاية ستكون معركة إرادات وذكاء للنجاة
overview_en: Two colleagues become stranded on a deserted island the only survivors of a plane crash On the island they must overcome past grievances and work together to survive but ultimately it s a battle of wills and wits to make it out alive

name: ヘルモード ～やり込み好きのゲーマーは廃設定の異世界で無双する～ はじまりの召喚士
original_name: ヘルモード ～やり込み好きのゲーマーは廃設定の異世界で無双する～ はじまりの召喚士
title: ヘルモード やり込み好きのゲーマーは廃設定の異世界で無双する はじまりの召喚士
title_en: HELL MODE The Hardcore Gamer Dominates in Another World with Garbage Balancing
overview_en: Kenichi Yamada a single 35 year old businessman has spent the majority of his adult life playing every MMORPG to hit the market Tired of the constant cycle of repetitive newbie centric gameplay he is immediately drawn in by the promise of a new game that on top of being never ending offers up a Hell Mode a difficulty level that makes it nigh impossible to level up but also promises uncapped growth potential Upon selecting the newly released Summoner class Kenichi finds himself reborn as Allen an infant in a serf family with nothing but his wits and old memories to guide him

name: 九个弹孔
title: 九个弹孔
overview_en: A farm boy endures three wartime eras and rises through repeated trials to become a revolutionary commander

name: 悬案
title: 悬案
overview_en: Unraveling two chilling mysteries each case explores how crime leaves lasting scars and how through fractured timelines belief can become a path to redemption

name: 春花宴
title: 春花宴
overview_en: Haunted by a blood feud assassin Mei Lin enters a dangerous world of royal intrigue and power struggles As she becomes the weapon of a mad prince the obsession of a ruthless heir and the object of a hostage prince s devotion she finds herself caught between revenge manipulation and love

name: ون بيس
overview: معتمرًا قبعته المصنوعة من القشّ ينطلق القرصان الشاب مونكي دي لوفي بمعية فريقه المتنوّع في رحلة ملحمية بحثًا عن كنز في هذه النسخة التمثيلية المقتبسة من سلسلة المانغا الشهيرة

seasons.name: الموسم 1
seasons.overview: معتمرًا قبعته المصنوعة من القشّ، ينطلق القرصان الشاب "مونكي دي لوفي" بمعية فريقه المتنوّع، في رحلة ملحمية بحثًا عن كنز، في هذه النسخة التمثيلية المقتبسة من سلسلة المانغا الشهيرة.

title: ون بيس
overview_en: With his straw hat and ragtag crew young pirate Monkey D Luffy goes on an epic voyage for treasure

name: L'Été 36
title: L Été 36
overview_en: Nice 1936 As workers enjoy their first paid holidays four very different women become entangled in the murder of a prosecutor at the Riviera hotel

name: 文豪ストレイドッグス わん!
original_name: 文豪ストレイドッグス わん!
title: 文豪ストレイドッグス わん
overview_en: The peaceful days of the very popular work Bungou Stray Dogs are here The characters of the Armed Detective Agency and the Mafia are in miniature form Due to Atsushi and co becoming cute this is a different experience to the original work a pleasant gag manga

name: Fallout
overview: سلسلة Fallout مقتبسة عن واحدة من أعظمِ ألعاب الفيديو على الإطلاق تتناول موضوع ما يقتنيه الفرد أو لا يقتنيه في عالم لم يتبقّ فيه شيئ بعد مئتي عام على نهاية العالم أجبرت قاطنة مسالمة في أحد الملاجئ على العودة إلى السطح وكم كانت صدمتها كبيرة حين رأت الأرض القاحلة التي في انتظارها
title: Fallout
overview_en: The story of haves and have nots in a world in which there s almost nothing left to have 200 years after the apocalypse the gentle denizens of luxury fallout shelters are forced to return to the irradiated hellscape their ancestors left behind and are shocked to discover an incredibly complex gleefully weird and highly violent universe waiting for them

title: صمام
overview: تدور أحداث الفيلم حين يكتشف عمال بناء في لندن وجود قنبلة لم تنفجر تحت الأرض منذ الحرب العالمية الثانية مما يؤدي إلى إخلاء موقع العمل لذا تستغل مجموعة من اللصوص حالة الفوضى في المحيط لتنفيذ عملية سرقة متقنة
overview_en: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation against a ticking clock

name: أرض العصابات
overview: السلطة على المحكّ إذ تتصادم عائلتان إجراميتان متحاربتان في معركة تُهدّد بإسقاط إمبراطوريتين في مرمى النيران يقف هاري دا سوزا المُدبّر البارع الذي يعرف جيدًا أين تكمن الولاءات عند تصادم القوى المتعارضة
title: أرض العصابات
overview_en: Two mob families clash in a war that threatens to topple empires and lives

title: صرخة ٧
overview: عندما يظهر قاتل جديد يُدعى غوستفيس في البلدة الهادئة حيث بنت سيدني بريسكوت حياة جديدة تتحقق أسوأ مخاوفها حين تصبح ابنتها الهدف التالي وعزماً منها على حماية عائلتها يتوجب على سيدني مواجهة أهوال ماضيها لوضع حد لإراقة الدماء إلى الأبد
overview_en: When a new Ghostface killer emerges in the quiet town where Sidney Prescott has built a new life her darkest fears are realized as her daughter becomes the next target Determined to protect her family Sidney must face the horrors of her past to put an end to the bloodshed once and for all

title: సింగ్ గీతం
overview_en: In an isolated village young Prathap seeks opportunity but enters a world of deception Drawn into uncontrollable forces he s caught between progress and preservation testing his beliefs and purpose

title: Jackass Best and Last
overview_en: The fifth and final installment to Jackass franchise where the crew go on one last insane crusade

name: بلدة المتقاعدين
overview: يتعيّن على مجموعة من الأبطال غير المتوقعين الذين يعيشون في مجتمع متقاعدين يبدو مثاليًا في ظاهره مواجهة تهديد خارق للطبيعة يسعى لسرقة الوقت وهو الشيء الوحيد الذي لا يملكونه
title: بلدة المتقاعدين
overview_en: In a seemingly perfect retirement community a crew of unlikely heroes must stop an otherworldly threat from stealing the one thing they don t have time

title: كيف تصنع الثروة قاتل
overview: بعدما تبرأت منه عائلته شديدة الثراء منذ ولادته لن يتوقف بيكيت ريدفيلو ابن الطبقة العاملة عند أي حد لاستعادة إرثه مهما كان عدد الأقارب الذين يقفون في طريقه
overview_en: Disowned at birth by his obscenely wealthy family blue collar Becket Redfellow will stop at nothing to reclaim his inheritance no matter how many relatives stand in his way

name: 転校先の清楚可憐な美少女が、昔男子と思って一緒に遊んだ幼馴染だった件
original_name: 転校先の清楚可憐な美少女が、昔男子と思って一緒に遊んだ幼馴染だった件
title: 転校先の清楚可憐な美少女が 昔男子と思って一緒に遊んだ幼馴染だった件
title_en: Oh Boy Was I Wrong About Her
overview_en: Seven years after making a childhood promise to always be friends Hayato is reunited with his formerly tomboyish pal Haruki at a city high school only now Haruki has transformed into the girl every guy dreams about While Haruki s looks may have changed with Hayato she s still the same pal he remembers Despite years apart their promise and feelings remain and deepen into something stronger

title: Resident Evil
overview_en: Bryan a medical courier is in the process of making a delivery when a sudden outbreak occurs forcing him to fight for survival

name: جريمة في النعيم
overview: في مجتمع هادئ يضم نخبة من الشخصيات البارزة تهزّ جريمة قتل غامضة أركانه مما يدفع العميل السري زافيير كولينز إلى كشف أسرار خطيرة تهدد استقرار الجميع
title: جريمة في النعيم
overview_en: The tranquility in a serene wealthy community inhabited by some of the world s most prominent individuals explodes when a shocking murder occurs and a high stakes investigation unfolds

title: نهاية شارع أوك
overview_en: After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings

name: 가족관계증명서
title: 가족관계증명서
overview_en: Judged as a mistress s daughter a young woman fights a stigma she never chose Meanwhile another woman s life stands still after her husband s betrayal Bound together by the death of the man who tore their lives apart these two apparent enemies are forced to confront one another under one roof As families scarred by hatred and heartbreak collide old wounds resurface Facing years of prejudice they set out to reclaim their lives and transform their bitter fate into an unexpected family bond

name: 手札が多めのビクトリア
original_name: 手札が多めのビクトリア
title: 手札が多めのビクトリア
overview_en: Betrayed by her own organization Chloe flees her life as a spy and starts over under the new identity of Victoria in the Kingdom of Ashberry Victoria wants a simple civilian life but the locals have other plans becoming enmeshed with an abandoned girl and a knight As the trio bonds and Victoria s past catches up to her the skills she perfected as a spy prove useful in her new life

name: The Fox Hollow Murders: Playground of a Serial Killer
original_name: The Fox Hollow Murders: Playground of a Serial Killer
title: The Fox Hollow Murders Playground of a Serial Killer
title_en: The Fox Hollow Murders Playground of a Serial Killer
overview_en: Hamilton County coroner Jeff Jellison launches a new investigation into Herb Baumeister decades after thousands of bones were found in the woods behind Fox Hollow Farms Baumeister s stately home Using new DNA technology Jellison and his team work to identify the human remains bringing long deferred closure to victims families and unearthing unsettling questions about potential accomplices missing evidence and a key witness whose story keeps changing

name: 黄泉のツガイ
overview: يعيش يورو وهو صياد شاب في قرية صغيرة في أعماق الجبال يصطاد الطرائد البرية ويعيش حياة متواضعة مع آسا شقيقته التوأم الصغرى تنقلب حياتهم الهادئة رأسًا على عقب عندما يهاجمهم تنين
title: 黄泉のツガイ
overview_en: Yuru a young hunter lives in a small village deep in the mountains hunting wild game and leading a humble life with Asa his younger twin sister Their peaceful lives are torn apart when a dragon s roar echoes across the sky What secrets lurk within their village What fate awaits them

name: うしろの正面カムイさん
original_name: うしろの正面カムイさん
title: うしろの正面カムイさん
overview_en: Shizuka is a normal high school girl with the ability to see ghosts Due to her peculiar tendency to attract ghosts she works as an assistant to Kamui a famous psychic Kamui takes pride in his top notch psychic abilities but the way he exorcises ghosts is rather unusual

title: الخطاة
overview: بعد سنوات من الهروب يعود شقيقان توأمان إلى بلدتهما الهادئة على أمل فتح صفحة جديدة لكن ماضيهما لم ينسَهما وشرّ أعظم ينتظرهما هناك شرّ لا يمكن الهروب منه هذه المرة
overview_en: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind twin brothers return to their hometown to start again only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back

title: Calle Málaga
overview_en: Maria Angeles a 79 year old Spanish woman lives alone in Tangier Morocco and enjoys her daily routine However her life is turned upside down when her daughter arrives from Madrid to sell the apartment in which she has always lived Determined to stay she does everything she can to get her home and her belongings back and unexpectedly rediscovers love and sensuality

title: موانا ٢
overview: بعد تلقيها نداء من أسلافها تسافر موانا و ماوي إلى بحار أوقيانوسيا البعيدة
overview_en: After receiving an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors Moana journeys alongside Maui and a new crew to the far seas of Oceania and into dangerous long lost waters for an adventure unlike anything she s ever faced

name: 領民0人スタートの辺境領主様
original_name: 領民0人スタートの辺境領主様
title: 領民0人スタートの辺境領主様
title_en: The Frontier Lord Begins with Zero Subjects
overview_en: The war is over and hero Dias is finally rewarded with land of his own only to discover it s a barren frontier with no people no villages and no sign of civilization With nothing but endless grassland ahead of him Dias sets out to build a domain from the ground up But after meeting Alna a mysterious girl with a blue horn his lonely frontier is about to spring to life

name: ديرديفل: يولد من جديد
overview: يتجه المحامي الأعمى مات ميردوك وزعيم المافيا الأسبق ويلسون فيسك نحو صدام حتمي
title: ديرديفل يولد من جديد
overview_en: Matt Murdock a blind lawyer with heightened abilities is fighting for justice through his bustling law firm while former mob boss Wilson Fisk pursues his own political endeavors in New York When their past identities begin to emerge both men find themselves on an inevitable collision course

title: Raptor Attack
overview_en: Jevan moves her family into her late mother s home only to discover her mother Iris a genetic scientist created a deadly raptor that s now on the loose As the creature hunts them Jevan and her family must fight to survive and find a way to stop the ultimate predator

name: 云秀行
title: 云秀行
overview_en: In the legendary Nine Cities noblewoman Fan Yun and cunning lord Qi Zheng join forces to overcome a looming crisis As they fight for the people s welfare their bond deepens into friendship and love to bring peace and prosperity to the realm

title: Wuthering Heights
overview_en: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw a woman from a wealthy family in 18th century England

title: Llueve sobre Babel
overview_en: In a retro futuristic tropical punk twist on Dante s Inferno a group of misfits converges at Babel a legendary dive bar that doubles as purgatory where La Flaca the city s Grim Reaper presides Here souls gamble years of their lives with her daring to outwit Death Herself

name: السيرك الرقمي المدهش
overview: تَعلَق امرأة في عالم افتراضي غريب يحمل طابع السيرك مع خمسة أشخاص آخرين حيث يجبرون على المشاركة في ألعاب يُوجّهها ذكاء اصطناعي غريب
title: السيرك الرقمي المدهش
overview_en: A woman finds herself trapped in a virtual circus where she and five other humans are subject to the whims of a wacky AI ringmaster In this digital purgatory they must face frightening NPCs and cope with their own personal traumas

name: 京城奇探
title: 京城奇探
overview_en: Zhao Shaoshang and Yuan Hong two young men from vastly different backgrounds join forces to solve one case after another Through their shared experiences they learn from each other grow together and become an unstoppable crime fighting duo in a tumultuous era

name: 逆爱成河
title: 逆爱成河
overview_en: When genius engineer Su Ming is betrayed by his friend Lu Zhen an and driven to suicide his daughter Su Xia is left traumatized Years later after transforming herself into a determined avenger Su Xia returns under an assumed identity and grows close to Lu Fan Lu Zhen an s son while secretly pursuing the truth behind her father s downfall

title: Power Ballad
overview_en: When Rick a past his prime wedding singer meets fading boy band star Danny during a gig the two bond over music and a late night jam session But when Danny turns one of Rick s songs into the hit that reignites his career Rick sets out to reclaim the recognition he believes he deserves even if it means risking everything he cares about

name: Slow Horses
overview: يتتبع مسلسل الدراما الجاسوسي الذكي فريقاً مختلاً من عملاء المخابرات ومديرهم البغيض جاكسون لامب سيئ السمعة وهم يخوضون خدع وألاعيب عالم الجاسوسية للدفاع عن إنكلترا من قوى الشر
title: Slow Horses
overview_en: Follow a dysfunctional team of MI5 agents and their obnoxious boss the notorious Jackson Lamb as they navigate the espionage world s smoke and mirrors to defend England from sinister forces

name: 令和のダラさん
title: 令和のダラさん
overview_en: After venturing into a restricted treacherous mountain forest siblings Hinata and Kaoru meet a terrifying serpent god and become besties Despite her initially scary appearance the self named god of misfortune is awkward lonely and surprisingly easy to talk to This is the tale of an unexpected friendship and the many comedic heartfelt adventures that ensue

title: Young Washington
overview_en: Before he led a nation George Washington was a young soldier thrown into a global conflict With alliances crumbling and war closing in he must choose who to trust and confront the leader he s becoming

title: धमाल 4
overview_en: The Dhamaal boys are back for another treasure hunt facing hilarious challenges in their quest for the Treasure of Life

title: Les Enfants de la Résistance
overview_en: During the German occupation of World War II François Eusèbe and Lisa three courageous children embark on a secret adventure resisting the Nazis in the heart of France Through sabotage hidden messages and perilous escapes they carry out clandestine actions right under the enemy s nose Daring and friendship are their only weapons in the fight against injustice

name: أكاديمية الأبطال
original_name: 僕のヒーローアカデミア
overview: إيزوكو ميدوريا كان مجرد تلميذ عادي في المرحلة المتوسطة في عالم يسكنه أناس غير عاديين لديهم قوى خارقه للطبيعه كأبطال المجلات المصورة الأمريكية لطالما أراد أن يكون بطلاً على الرغم من أن زملاءه يسخرون منه و يتنمرون عليه لأنه لا يمتلك قوة خارقه للطبيعه في أحد الأيام شاهد وحش شرير يهاجم صديق طفولته كاتوسكي فتدخل ايزوكو وأنقذه أقوى بطل خارق في العالم أوول مايت شاهد ايزوكو و أعجب بشجاعته فطلب منه وراثه قوته الخارقة و ساعده بعد ذلك على الاندراج في أكاديمية يو إيه التي تتخصص في تخريج أبطال خارقين
title: أكاديمية الأبطال
overview_en: After he saves a bully from a Villain a normal student is granted a superpower that allows him to attend a high school training academy for Heroes

name: LIAR GAME
title: LIAR GAME
overview_en: When Nao Kanzaki receives a strange letter and a suitcase containing 100 million yen she learns that she has been selected to participate in the LIAR GAME In this high stakes psychological battle lies deception and betrayal reign supreme Naïve and honest Nao turns to Shinichi Akiyama a brilliant former con artist to survive the twisted game In a game built on lies can honesty prevail

name: حكايات غريبة من عهد أسرة تانغ
overview: وهو مسلسل تشويق وفانتازيا تاريخي يدور حول قضايا جنائية غامضة وحوادث خارقة للطبيعة تقع في عهد أسرة تانغ ويقوم بحلها ثنائي يجمع بين الذكاء والمهارة القتالية
title: حكايات غريبة من عهد أسرة تانغ
overview_en: General Lu Lingfeng and Detective Su Wuming uncover supernatural mysteries and hidden conspiracies threatening the empire during Emperor Xuanzong s reign

title: Mother Mary
overview_en: Long buried wounds rise to the surface when iconic pop star Mother Mary reunites with her estranged best friend and former costume designer Sam Anselm on the eve of her comeback performance

title: Katy Perry Live at Rock in Rio Lisboa 2026
original_title: Katy Perry Live at Rock in Rio Lisboa 2026
title_en: Katy Perry Live at Rock in Rio Lisboa 2026

title: ONE PIECE HEROINES
overview_en: After buying a pair of shoes that end up hurting her feet Nami returns to the shop feeling dissatisfied There she meets Lebno the designer who tells her I ll make you a brand new pair from scratch but only if you ll be my model The shoes are crafted by the artisan Miucha leading to an unexpected and stylish encounter

name: Sugar
overview: يلعب كولين فاريل دور جون شوغر محقق خاص أنيق يجوب الأركان المظلمة في لوس أنجلوس المشمسة رغم أنه لا يرى سوى جوانب الخير في البشر يلاحق شوغر سرّ في غاية الخطورة يجب ألّا ينكشف
title: Sugar
overview_en: John Sugar is a dashing private eye navigating the dark corners of sunny LA Though he sees only the good in humanity Sugar is haunted by a secret too dangerous to expose

name: Lock Upp
title: Lock Upp
overview_en: Lockupp is a 24 7 captive reality show which has 16 celebrities locked inside the queen s jail for 72 days Who will survive the badass jail and play atyachaari khel

name: 密室大逃脱
title: 密室大逃脱
overview_en: Cast members work together to escape a secret room

name: 百日成王
title: 百日成王
overview_en: Driven to the brink of despair restaurant owner Ming forms an unlikely bond with the soul of the true King Lie after swallowing it to save his loved one Bound together by fate the two embark on a perilous journey to challenge the tyrant who has usurped the throne With only one hundred days to change their destiny Ming uses his extraordinary memory to master long lost magic gathering allies and winning the support of the people along the way As their strength grows so does their resolve to overthrow a corrupt regime reclaim the rightful king s throne and restore peace to the realm

name: 捨てられ聖女の異世界ごはん旅 隠れスキルでキャンピングカーを召喚しました
original_name: 捨てられ聖女の異世界ごはん旅 隠れスキルでキャンピングカーを召喚しました
title: 捨てられ聖女の異世界ごはん旅 隠れスキルでキャンピングカーを召喚しました
title_en: The Forsaken Saintess and Her Foodie Road Trip in Another World
overview_en: Late 20 s caregiver Rin Takanashi has been summoned as a saint only to then be dumped alone in another world Equipped with just her ridiculously overpowered god like skills Motor Home aka Mochan and Survival she decides to indulge her love of solo camping and cooking in this strange new place Thus begins Rin s journey one filled with gourmet cuisine and an array of wonderful companions along the way

name: مغامراتي مع سوبرمان
overview: في ريعان عشرينياتهم يشرع كلارك كينت وإلى جانبه لويس لين بذكائها الوقّاد وعزيمتها التي لا تلين وصديقهما الأقرب جيمي أولسن في سبر أغوار ذواتهم وهناك يكتشف الثلاثة سويًا آفاق الإنجازات الاستثنائية التي يمكنهم تحقيقها كفريق صحفي استقصائي متكاتف بين أروقة صحيفة الـ ديلي بلانيت
title: مغامراتي مع سوبرمان
overview_en: Twenty somethings Clark Kent the bright and driven Lois Lane and their best friend Jimmy Olsen begin to discover who they are and everything they can accomplish together as an investigative reporting team at the Daily Planet

name: 骸骨騎士様、只今異世界へお出掛け中
original_name: 骸骨騎士様、只今異世界へお出掛け中
title: 骸骨騎士様 只今異世界へお出掛け中
overview_en: One day a gamer played video games until he fell asleep and when he woke up he found himself in the game world as a skeleton Equipped with the powerful weapons and armor of his avatar but stuck with its frightening skeletal appearance Arc has to find a place for himself in this new fantastical land All his hopes for a quiet life are dashed when he crosses paths with a beautiful elven warrior setting him on a journey full of conflict and adventure

name: ساوث بارك
overview: يتبع مغامرات أربعة طلاب أشقياء في بلدة ساوث بارك الهادئة المختلة وظيفيا في ولاية كولورادو الأمريكية

seasons.name: الموسم 22
seasons.overview: في هذا الموسم، يُصادق "باترز" كاهنًا، وينتهي أمر السيّد "هانكي"، وينشر مخلوق "إنسان-دُبّ-خنزير" الفوضى... لا تفُتك هذه الحلقات الممتعة!

seasons.name: الموسم 23
seasons.overview: يكافح "راندي" لإنجاح مزرعة الماريغوانا، ويصدر "كايل" تحذيرًا، ويتألّق "ستان" بغناء "ميتال الموت"، ويحتجّ "كارتمان" على قائمة طعام المقصف.

title: ساوث بارك
overview_en: Follow the misadventures of four irreverent grade schoolers in the quiet dysfunctional town of South Park Colorado
